# Stop Pipeline Wiring Fixtures

These fixtures are synthetic stop group records used to prove normalized stop
pipeline wiring. They contain no private PDFs, screenshots, broker names,
addresses, rates, references, MC numbers, or private text.

The fixtures intentionally model structural failure modes:

- mergeable single-line groups;
- multiple mergeable single-line sections;
- distinct non-mergeable stop sections;
- signature/footer noise;
- a passthrough case that should fail if wiring does not reduce mergeable
  groups.
